message:
bd-1uy.1.3: Hostcall ABI shared dispatcher + taxonomy

Implement the shared hostcall dispatcher that enforces canonical
HostCallPayload representation, taxonomy-only error codes, and
deterministic params hashing for all hostcall paths.

- Add HostCallContext struct for dependency injection into dispatcher
- Add hostcall_request_to_payload() for JS→canonical conversion
- Add host_result_to_outcome() and outcome_to_host_result() converters
- Implement dispatch_host_call_shared() with policy check + routing
- Wire dispatch_hostcall_with_runtime() through shared dispatcher
- Add 21 unit tests covering dispatch, conversion, and logging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
